title: Converting subitems to items automatically
excerpt: It would be great to have an automation when subitems can be converted into items based on some conditions. For example, when item created and only if it contains subitem, then move only the subitem to another board conv…

posts.author: sandro (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to have an automation when subitems can be converted into items based on some conditions. For example, when item created and only if it contains subitem, then move only the subitem to another board converted as the regular item.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
We developed an app called subitem automations that provides robust automation capabilities to subitems. It also includes the ability to convert subitems to items and vice versa here’s an example.

Convert subitem to item →

Screenshot 2024-03-06 at 18.07.071268×233 22.6 KB

Convert item to subitem →

Screenshot 2024-03-06 at 18.07.451345×221 13.3 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!
